meta.title: Tibeb — Travel Ethiopia with a local guide
meta.description: Private, tailor-made journeys across Ethiopia with an experienced local guide. Rock churches, highland treks, coffee origins and more.

hero.title: See <eth>Ethiopia</eth> through the eyes of someone who calls it home
hero.subtitle: From the rock-hewn churches of Lalibela to the peaks of the Simien Mountains — tailor-made trips, at your pace, with a guide who knows the way.

guide.title: A storyteller for the road
guide.bio: I've spent years walking travellers through Ethiopia's history, mountains and markets. I handle the logistics, the language and the introductions — you bring the curiosity. Every trip is built around what you actually want to see.

places.title: Places worth the journey
places.subtitle: A starting point, not a fixed menu. Mix, match, or tell me what you have in mind.

lalibela.name: Lalibela
lalibela.description: Eleven medieval churches carved straight down into the rock — still a living place of pilgrimage.

simien.name: Simien Mountains
simien.description: Jagged escarpments, gelada baboons and some of the best high-altitude trekking in Africa.

danakil.name: Danakil Depression
danakil.description: Sulphur fields, salt flats and a lava lake — one of the hottest, strangest landscapes on Earth.

omo.name: Omo Valley
omo.description: A meeting of cultures along the river, visited with respect and local introductions.

gondar.name: Gondar
gondar.description: Royal castles and painted churches from Ethiopia's 17th-century imperial capital.

addis.name: Addis Ababa
addis.description: Museums, jazz, markets and the best coffee culture in the country to begin or end a trip.

booking.title: Pick a day to start
booking.subtitle: Highlighted days are open. Choose one and send a request — I'll confirm availability and follow up personally. No payment needed to ask.
booking.noDays: No open days listed right now — send a message and we'll find a date.

form.name: Your name
form.message: Anything you'd like me to know?
form.success: Request sent. I'll be in touch by email shortly.
form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
form.errorDay: That day just filled up. Please pick another.
form.pickDayFirst: Pick a day above to continue.

contact.title: Questions? Just reach out
contact.subtitle: Happy to help you shape an itinerary before you commit to anything.
contact.responseTime: I usually reply within a day.

flights.title: Flights to Addis Ababa
flights.subtitle: Quick search for flights to Bole International (ADD). We'll prefill the date you picked.
flights.note: Opens Google Flights in a new tab.

login.title: Guide sign-in
login.subtitle: Manage your calendar and trip requests.

calendar.title: Your availability
calendar.subtitle: Tap a day to cycle it: open → blocked → cleared. Booked days are set by confirmed trips.
